title: dolicholus precatorius
intro: Dolicholus precatorius, also known as the climbing dolichos or hairy dolichos, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolicholus precatorius include the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Dolicholus precatorius is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
